data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 8/22(Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Commissions will be doubled.
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

Period: 8/22 (Mon) 19:00 – 8/29 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
